chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 1312 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 05.09.2023 For orders on MA 7192/23 For orders on office objections For orders on MA 7193/23 For orders on MA 7194/23 For hearing of main case Mr. Muhammad Hassan Chandio, Advocate for petitioner 1. Urgency granted. 2. To be considered on the next date. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4&5 Petitioner has made an attempt to have an order of his appointment against the land purportedly donated by him for the purposes of school. This is no more a law whereby the petitioner could have been appointed as Chowkidar of the said school or for any other post. This very issue of getting employment in lieu of donation of plot has been settled by the Honourable Supreme Court of Pakistan in Civil Appeal Nos. 19-K to 50-K of 2015. Petition merits no consideration and is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
